parameters.name: select
parameters.label: Select
parameters.description: This menu selects how the edges in the image are found. The edges will appear raised or depressed in the output image depending on their slope.

parameters.name: method
parameters.label: Method
parameters.description: Determines what pixels to use when calculating the slope at each pixel in the image.

parameters.name: midpoint
parameters.label: Midpoint
parameters.description: Sets the greyscale color of the midpoint of the emboss. This is the color of any part in the image that is not raised or depressed.

parameters.name: strength
parameters.label: Strength
parameters.description: The depth of the emboss. Higher values make the output look more deeply etched.

parameters.name: offsetunit
parameters.label: Sample Step Unit
parameters.description: Sets the units used in the Sample Step parameter.

parameters.name: direction
parameters.label: Direction
parameters.description: Controls the position of the light source, changing the direction of the highlights and shadows in the embossed output image.

parameters.name: offset2
parameters.label: Offset2
parameters.description: When sampling the image, this determines the distance from each pixel to the sample pixel. When units are set to pixels, it is the number of pixels away from the current pixel which is sampled to find
